dependency_delta.reason: source observation and initial-context evidence use canonical SHA-256 digests; CompleteAgentHost implements the Host-neutral Runtime lifecycle port

owned_changes.action: make Managed Runtime command/read/change/projection the only production contract and generator root
delete the Platform-owned Driver, Journal, Context Activation and terminal hook contract roots
make Runtime transaction, normalized Complete Agent projection and typed desired-surface admission the only Runtime library roots
delete the Platform-owned legacy Runtime implementation and evidence
make Complete Agent service/offer/placement/binding/generation/effect/lease and reverse callbacks the only Host roots
delete the legacy Driver Host graph and test adapters
make revision 4 the unique Runtime plus Complete Agent transport and remove Integration/Driver generator inputs

runtime_repository_contract.authority: one ManagedRuntimeStateCommit is one Runtime transaction
required_transaction: lock and compare ManagedRuntimeStateRevision for one Runtime thread
admit against the committed projection revision and command availability
prepare source normalization and Runtime projection candidates without an independent write
write source projection, source identity mappings and source changes in the same ManagedRuntimeStateCommit as their Runtime projection, typed changes and outbox
append exactly one SourceObservationApplied change and matching outbox row for every appended source change, including normalized no-op observations
append exactly one SourceProjectionChanged wrapper per changed section with explicit source change sequence, projection revision, observation digest, section digest and full section payload
write immutable operation identity and idempotency mapping
commit the Host-returned source binding and applied-surface evidence before lifecycle activation
write pending effect intent before any external dispatch
advance projection operation and availability facts
append typed Runtime changes and one outbox row per change
advance projection change head and state revision atomically
return the stored receipt for exact idempotency replay without a second write
required_constraints: operation identity, thread and command are immutable
source binding and terminal operation evidence are immutable and mutually consistent
idempotency key uniquely maps to one immutable operation command
pending command exactly equals its authoritative operation command
projection operations have one entry per authoritative operation id with exact payload, turn and status
availability evidence is complete and decided at the committed projection revision
pending effect identity and command coordinates are immutable
operation and pending delivery states cannot move backwards
source authority, fidelity, revision, identity mapping and source change history are monotonic
each source change has exactly one causal SourceObservationApplied delta with exact source, projection revision, observation, source revision, cursor and changed-section digests
each listed changed section has exactly one source-derived concrete wrapper and sections not listed by the observation have none
source-derived concrete wrappers exactly match the observation sequence/revision/digest and the reconstructed normalized section payload/digest
a source observation and every causal or concrete Runtime projection/change/outbox fact derived from it commit or fail together
a normalized no-op source observation has empty changed_sections and no concrete projection delta, but retains its causal change and outbox
without a trusted local source cursor, or after a gap/partial page, snapshot reconcile keeps source_cursor null instead of trusting page.next
Runtime change sequence is continuous and append-only
every Runtime change has exactly one matching append-only outbox entry

callback_repository_contract.authority: callback CAS outcomes are durable execution facts and reference the Host-owned route fence
required_transaction: load the committed Host route and validate source, binding generation, tombstone and semantic deadline before reservation
lock and compare CompleteAgentCallbackRevision
commit an immutable Pending reservation carrying the committed route generation and bound-surface digest before invoking any Tool or Hook handler
invoke the platform handler only after the reservation transaction commits
settle the typed Tool or Hook outcome with a second callback CAS
after restart, replay Settled outcomes and block Pending, InspectionRequired or Unknown records without re-execution
expose durable inspection plus explicit reconciliation or settlement for ambiguous outcomes
required_constraints: reservation route_id, generation and bound_surface_digest have a compound reference to one active committed Host route fence
idempotency key fixes callback kind, request digest, generation, bound surface, source and deadline
Pending can advance only to InspectionRequired, Unknown or a typed Settled outcome
InspectionRequired and Unknown never cause automatic handler re-execution
typed terminal outcomes are immutable and exact duplicate replay performs no write

host_repository_contract.authority: one CompleteAgentHostCommit is one Host transaction
required_transaction: lock and compare CompleteAgentHostRevision
validate one immutable descriptor, offer and placement per service instance
validate binding/source/generation/profile/surface coordinates
persist Create, Resume and Fork lifecycle intent before invoking the Complete Agent service
when a callback-bound surface becomes Applied/Available, insert its unique route in the same Host revision transaction
when a callback-bound applied surface is revoked or lost, retain the immutable route and append its tombstone in the same Host revision transaction
validate effect identity, payload and append-only attempt evidence
validate active lease owner, token, epoch, generation and database-clock expiry
fence external receipt and inspection against the current lease
settle revoke receipt and applied-surface cleanup atomically
persist the complete changed Host fact graph and advance revision
return exact committed replay without a second write
required_constraints: service instance identity fixes descriptor, exact Runtime offer and placement
Runtime lifecycle target fixes service, generation, profile, bound surface and callback binding
lifecycle effect identity fixes operation kind, target, initial context or exact fork cutoff and terminal outcome
placement is exactly one of in_process, local_process or remote and all coordinates are non-empty
binding generation is positive and binding/source mapping is bidirectionally unique
an Available callback-bound applied surface has exactly one active route with exact binding, generation, source and bound-surface digest
an Available surface without AgentNativeCallback contributions has no active route
route identity, request fence, binding generation, source, delivery, deadline and bound surface are immutable
route tombstones are append-only and permanently fence callbacks from the old route generation
effect identity fixes command, payload, binding, source and generation
attempt history is continuous, immutable and append-only
terminal effect evidence cannot be downgraded or rewritten
lease epoch never decreases and Lost binding invalidates its active lease

semantic_matrix.duty: source authority, fidelity, identity, snapshot/change reconcile, retention gap and committed availability
typed desired surface and one causal route
durable Tool/Hook route, pre-effect reservation, restart replay, ambiguous-outcome inspection and stale-generation fencing
production Managed Runtime lifecycle admission, durable dispatch, recovery, fork provisioning and explicit activation
unique revision 4 Runtime and Complete Agent transport

canonical_generators.schema_closure: Runtime plus Complete Agent service/callback/change frames

external_consumers.action: consume typed Runtime change/projection
inject ManagedAgentRuntimeGateway and typed read/change state
register Remote Complete Agent and revision 4 business frames
assert typed Runtime/Agent changes
collect Complete Agent service registrations
negotiate revision 4 only
relay revision 4 Runtime/Complete Agent frames
project lifecycle output from typed Runtime changes
consume Managed Runtime snapshot/change projection
replace universal journal with Runtime change read model
derive presentation from committed Runtime changes
derive thread name from typed Runtime/Agent output
rewrite fixture to Runtime changes
rewrite facade fixture to Managed Runtime contract
construct PostgreSQL Runtime/Host/callback repositories and Complete Agent registry
replace legacy workers with pending Runtime effect, Host recovery and ambiguous callback inspection workers
delete after final Runtime projection/surface persistence is active

implement ManagedRuntimeStateRepository, CompleteAgentHostRepository and CompleteAgentCallbackRepository using the single final migration; source-normalized facts belong to ManagedRuntimeStateRepository
replace with Runtime pending-effect and Complete Agent recovery evidence
delete legacy driver contribution API after all Complete Agent registrations land
expose Complete Agent service contribution only
remove legacy public documentation/export
register Codex Complete Agent service
switch production module to Codex Complete Agent adapter
map Codex native state to AgentSnapshot/AgentChange
switch production module to Native Complete Agent service
emit Agent history/change instead of Runtime journal
delete driver fixture and validate Complete Agent conformance
replace legacy driver proxy with revision 4 Complete Agent proxy
compose Complete Agent Host and revision 4 transport
dispatch revision 4 Runtime and Complete Agent business frames
accept final Complete Agent registrations
relay revision 4 only

combined_apply_order: apply this Platform Runtime activation component
apply W2 Dash/Core physical activation and Native Complete Agent callers
apply W6 Codex/Remote Complete Agent callers
apply W7 Product/Protocol Managed Runtime callers
apply W8 root Cargo/lock, final migration, PostgreSQL adapters and production composition
regenerate the four canonical TypeScript/JSON Schema artifacts once
verify zero legacy consumers and run full workspace gates

w8_supplies: one process-local CompleteAgentServiceRegistry populated with final Complete Agent registrations
CompleteAgentRuntimeTarget registrations for every production Runtime thread placement
database-backed lease and recovery workers for pending Runtime and Host lifecycle effects
production_composition_prerequisites.activation_rule: Product submits Fork once, observes its terminal operation evidence, and sends a separate Activate only after Provisioned evidence; no Product DTO contains Host source, generation, lease or provisioning fields

component_tests: cargo test -p agentdash-agent-runtime-contract -p agentdash-agent-runtime -p agentdash-agent-runtime-host -p agentdash-agent-runtime-wire
cargo clippy -p agentdash-agent-runtime-contract -p agentdash-agent-runtime -p agentdash-agent-runtime-host -p agentdash-agent-runtime-wire --all-targets -- -D warnings
combined_only: all 33 external consumer entries are removed or switched by their owner
root Cargo.toml and Cargo.lock expose only final dependencies
the one final forward migration implements Runtime, Host and callback repository contracts
production composition injects PostgreSQL Runtime/Host/callback repositories and Complete Agent registrations without in-memory defaults
revision 4 is the only registered and generated Runtime Wire revision
canonical generators produce no legacy Driver, Journal or Context Activation declarations
